title: EfficientMC
description: A streamlined and lightweight Modpack crafted to boost Minecraft's performance without changing the gameplay experience in any way.
body:
# ![EfficientMC](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/587fee7780bbf10b74b370d29fcc12968f869dc8.png)
While browsing Modrinth, it's clear that many "performance" modpacks are cluttered with unnecessary quality-of-life mods. This pack was created to address that issue, providing _a pure performance boost without any extra frills_. It includes only _non-invasive mods_ that won't alter your gameplay experience in any way. You'll also find _all the essential features you'd expect_ from an optimization modpack, including shader support and compatibility with OptiFine texture packs.

✅ Large perfomance boost

✅ Replacement for Optifine

✅ Shaders

✅ _NO_ changes to the vanilla gameplay experience!

## List of Mods in the latest version:

<details>
<summary>Expand</summary>

- Ferrite Core (Reduces the memory usage of Minecraft)
  
- Fabric Skyboxes (Adds the ability for resource packs to change Minecraft's skybox)

- Opti GUI (Enables custom GUIs through resource packs)
  
- Continuity (Allows for connected textures through resource packs)
 
- Sodium (FPS BOOOOOOOST!)

- Iris Shaders (Adds the ability to run shaders)

- Lithium (Improves a number of systems, but for example: AI, physics, block ticking)

- More Culling (Culls many different blocks, or in other words makes them disapear when offscreen)

- Debugify (Fixes many bugs, some of which could affect performance)

- Sodium Extra (Adds more options to sodium)

- Modern Fix (Reduces Mincrafts Memory usage and fixes many bugs)

- Entity Texture Features (Adds more properties to entities that resource packs can change, for example to make them glow)

- Krypton (Improves multiplayer performance)

- Nosium (Improves chunk performance)

- Faster Random (Speeds up world generating times and also improves your performance when generating chunks)

- Concurrent Chunk Management Engine (Improves chunk performance)

- Fast Ip Ping (Allows you to ping multiplayer servers faster)

- Thread Tweak (Allows you to improve Minecraft's CPU scheduling)

- Reese's Sodium Options (Adds more options to sodium)

- ImmediatleyFast (Optimizes minecrafts rendering system)

- Entity Culling (Culls entities when offscreen) 

- Bad Optimizations (Optimizes many things outside of rendering, for example the sky color)

- Dynamic Fps (Limits Minecrafts fps when you are not on the game, saving computer resources)

- Entity Model Features (Allows resource packs to change entities models)

- Entity Sound Features (Allows resource packs to change entities sounds)

- Sodium Shadowy Path Blocks (Fixes a Sodium side effect that removes the shadows from path blocks)

- Very Many Players (Improves minecraft's performance with large playercounts)

- Mod Menu (Allows you to see and configure the mods in EfficientMC)


</details>


### Read this! ⬇️
Optifine _must_ be downloaded separately for the 1.8.9 version of EfficientMC! See the Changelog for a guide on how to do this.
